response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the required hardware/SOC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis experience central to the Principal Performance Architect role. His background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, AI-agent infrastructure, and general software engineering, with no demonstrated expertise in hardware-software co-design, performance bottlenecks for AI workloads, or SoC/IP modeling. His educational path (Bachelor's in CS/Photography) and professional experience do not align with the technical depth or specialization required for this position.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance optimization for web/mobile applications
Demonstrated expertise in full-stack development, CI/CD, and testing methodologies (TDD, Pairing)
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No experience in SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
No documented background in AI accelerator optimization, deep-learning workload analysis, or GPU architecture
Lacks the required advanced technical qualifications (e.g., PhD, Master's with 6+ years, or Bachelor's with 8+ years) for this Principal-level hardware-focused role
